description: CompositionBlack and white plaid check shirt made of 100% cotton, with full sleeves, full buttoned placket, curved hemline and pocket on left chestFittingSlimWash care Pre-soak the garment before wash Wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened Preferably hand washed Use only mild detergents Wash dark colours separately Do not attempt to remove stains by spot washing Drip dry on hanger and avoid wringing Flat dry Preferably steam iron This black and white plaid check shirt from scullers is a great addition to your wardrobe.  The classic black and white combo remains an evergreen favourite.
